meaning: n.栅栏,围起处vt.用栅栏围住
examples: All you need do is keep out of the stockade.
When I reached the stockade , the house lay in dark shadow .
We were clear out of the ship, but not yet ashore in our stockade.
Surrounded by a crude stockade, much of it topped with thorns, the hamlet is well defended against outside predators.
He wanted to spend the rest of the war in the stockade.
